query:
INSERT INTO products (establishmentId, categoryId, name, description, price, status, hasStock, sortOrder) 
SELECT 2, c.id, p.name, p.description, p.price, 'active', true, p.sortOrder
FROM categories c
CROSS JOIN (
  SELECT 'Batata Frita' as name, 'Porção de batata frita crocante com sal (300g)' as description, 18.90 as price, 1 as sortOrder
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Onion Rings', 'Anéis de cebola empanados e fritos (250g)', 22.90, 2
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Chicken Fingers', 'Tirinhas de frango empanadas (300g) com molho honey mustard', 28.90, 3
  UNION ALL SELECT 'Nachos Supreme', 'Nachos com cheddar, carne moída, jalapeño, guacamole e sour cream', 32.90, 4
) p
WHERE c.name = 'Porções' AND c.establishmentId = 2;
